info: I create the structure, style, and interactive behavior of the user interface using the latest technologies.
Ensure the user interface is responsive, effectively adapting to different screen sizes and devices, providing a consistent experience.
Collaborate with backend developers to integrate the user interface with services and data provided by servers, often through APIs (Application Programming Interfaces).
Optimize code to ensure fast loading of the user interface, minimizing page load times and improving the user experience.
Perform unit and integration testing to ensure the quality and stability of the frontend code.
Use version control systems like Git to manage source code and collaborate efficiently with other developers.
Work in conjunction with designers to implement attractive and functional designs and layouts.
Ensure the user interface is accessible to users with different abilities, following accessibility guidelines.
Perform updates and bug fixes, ensuring the user interface remains functional and compatible with technological changes.
services.title: Frontend Developer

info: I focus on building server-side business logic, processing client requests, interacting with the database, and providing data and resources to the frontend.
Design, create, and maintain databases that store application data, including SQL queries, performance optimization, and data integrity assurance.
Develop and maintain APIs that allow communication between the frontend and backend, crucial for integrating different parts of a system.
Implement authentication systems to ensure users are who they claim to be, and authorization to control access to specific resources based on permissions.
Ensure the security of the application against threats such as SQL injection, cross-site scripting (XSS), cross-site request forgery (CSRF), and other cyber attacks.
Optimize server performance by identifying and resolving bottlenecks, improving code efficiency, and implementing caching strategies.
Monitor and maintain system integrity, identifying and fixing bugs, performance issues, or other failures.
Integrate third-party services, such as payment systems, external APIs, and other components necessary for the application's operation.
Design the system to be scalable, ensuring it can handle an increase in the number of users and workload.
Create clear and comprehensive documentation for code, APIs, and processes, facilitating understanding and maintenance by other team members.
services.title: Backend Developer

info: Front-end, back-end, and data structure development, providing a comprehensive and integrated view for creating complete solutions.
Front-end Development:
- I create the structure, style, and interactive behavior of the user interface using the latest technologies.
- Ensure the user interface is responsive, effectively adapting to different screen sizes and devices, providing a consistent experience.
Back-end Development:
- Design and implement business logic and data handling, using server-side programming languages such as Node.js.
- Interact with databases, such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, etc.
Database Development:
- Design and optimize database schemas.
- Write SQL queries and manage data access, using ORMs (Object-Relational Mapping) when applicable.
API (Application Programming Interface) Development:
- Create and maintain APIs for communication between the front-end and back-end, using protocols like REST.
Server and Infrastructure Management:
- Configure and manage web servers.
- Use automation and provisioning tools, such as Docker, Kubernetes, etc.
Security:
- Implement security practices in code, communications, and server settings.
- Conduct security audits and address vulnerabilities.
Version Control:
- Use version control systems like Git to track changes in code.
Testing:
- Write automated tests to ensure code robustness.
- Perform unit, integration, and system testing.
Collaboration and Communication:
- Work in a team and collaborate with other developers, designers, and professionals from other areas.
- Participate in meetings to discuss requirements and plan development.
services.title: Fullstack Developer
